taxonomy: Krynitzkia diffusa is a species of flowering plant in the family Boraginaceae. It belongs to the genus Krynitzkia, which is a group of plants that are primarily found in the tropical regions of Central and South America. The plant's classification is further divided into its kingdom, which is Plantae, and its phylum, which is Magnoliophyta. Krynitzkia diffusa is also classified into the class Magnoliopsida and the order Borales. Its family, Boraginaceae, is a group of flowering plants that are known for their diverse range of species and habitats.
